nasb.text: Then Husham died, and Hadad the son of Bedad, who defeated Midian in the field of Moab, became king in his place; and the name of his city was Avith.

esv.text: Husham died, and Hadad the son of Bedad, who defeated Midian in the country of Moab, reigned in his place, the name of his city being Avith.

cnv.text: 戶珊死後，比達的兒子哈達接替他作王；這哈達就是在摩押原野上擊敗了米甸人的；他的京城名叫亞未得。

ccb.text: 户珊死后，比达之子哈达继位，定都亚未得，他曾在摩押地区击败米甸人。

csbs.text: 户珊死后，比达的儿子哈达接替他作王； 哈达曾在摩押地击败米甸人， 他的城名叫亚未得。
